coreJobStatement: Generate and deliver thermal energy to occupied spaces and domestic hot-water systems via heated-water circuits
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what subsystems compose hydronic heating appliances and their installation ecosystem
marketSize: ~$8–12B globally (hydronic heating equipment); North America residential boiler market led by Bosch Thermotechnology (~11.5% share) [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Gas Burner Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Premix or atmospheric burner converting natural gas or propane into thermal energy. Modulating premix burners with 1:5 to 1:10 turndown dominate condensing boilers. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Primary Heat Exchanger
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transfers combustion energy to hydronic water. Condensing boilers use stainless steel (316L) or aluminium-silicon alloy to withstand acidic condensate (pH 3–5). The single most expensive component in a condensing boiler. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Oil Burner Assembly
vnUnits.functionalJob: Pressure-atomising or rotary-cup oil burner for oil-fired boilers. Declining market share in North America/EU but significant installed base.

vnUnits.name: Electric Heating Element
vnUnits.functionalJob: Immersion or flanged resistance heating element for electric hydronic boilers. Simpler construction than combustion; no flue required.

vnUnits.name: Solar Thermal Collector
vnUnits.functionalJob: Flat-plate or evacuated-tube solar collector for solar water heating systems. Pre-heats hydronic circuit or DHW storage.

vnUnits.name: Flue Gas System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Exhaust path from combustion chamber to atmosphere. Concentric (room-sealed) flues dominate modern installations.

vnUnits.name: Circulator Pump
vnUnits.functionalJob: Prime mover of the hydronic loop. Modern systems use high-efficiency EC circulators (Wilo, Grundfos ~70% combined EU share) with integrated differential-pressure control. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Hydraulic Separator
vnUnits.functionalJob: Decouples primary (heat-source) circuit from secondary (distribution) circuit. Essential in multi-zone systems.

vnUnits.name: Distribution Manifold
vnUnits.functionalJob: Multi-port header splitting primary supply into individual zone circuits. Particularly important for radiant floor heating.

vnUnits.name: Piping Network
vnUnits.functionalJob: Physical conduit for heated water. Material depends on application: copper for primary, PEX/PE-RT for radiant loops, multilayer composite for risers.

vnUnits.name: Flow Sensing & Measurement
vnUnits.functionalJob: Instruments measuring volumetric flow rate, flow direction, medium temperature, and medium condition within the hydronic loop. The flow signal feeds appliance controllers for safety interlocks, circulator modulation, thermal energy calculation (Q = m-dot x cp x delta-T), and anomaly detection. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Expansion & Safety Devices
vnUnits.functionalJob: Pressure management and safety relief protecting the closed hydronic loop.

vnUnits.name: Water Treatment & Filtration
vnUnits.functionalJob: Protects hydronic loop from corrosion, scaling, and sludge. Critical in retrofit installations.

vnUnits.name: Hydronic Baseboard Heater
vnUnits.functionalJob: Finned-tube convector in painted steel housing. Cooler air enters bottom, warms over fins, rises from top — primarily convective heat transfer. Hydronic baseboard holds ~46% of the baseboard heater market. Key manufacturers: Slant/Fin, Runtal, Marley (Regal Beloit). [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Panel Radiator
vnUnits.functionalJob: Steel panel radiators with convector fins. Dominant emitter in European retrofit markets. Types 11 through 33. Manufacturers: Stelrad, Purmo, Kermi, Myson.

vnUnits.name: Radiant Floor Heating
vnUnits.functionalJob: PEX/PE-RT pipe loops embedded in screed or dry-plate. Preferred for new-build with condensing boilers due to low-temperature compatibility. Market growing at ~6% CAGR to $8.9B by 2036. [SRC: web_search]

vnUnits.name: Fan Coil Unit (Hydronic)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Forced-convection emitter using water-to-air heat exchanger with EC fan. Used where rapid heat-up needed or space constrained.

vnUnits.name: Appliance Controller / PCB
vnUnits.functionalJob: Main control board running combustion management, safety interlocks, pump sequencing, and diagnostics.

vnUnits.name: Room Thermostat / User Interface
vnUnits.functionalJob: Occupant-facing control: simple programmable through smart/connected (Nest, Ecobee, Honeywell Home).

vnUnits.name: Weather Compensation Module
vnUnits.functionalJob: Outdoor sensor + reset-curve logic adjusting supply water temperature to heating load. Prerequisite for high-efficiency condensing operation.

vnUnits.name: BUS Communication & Gateway
vnUnits.functionalJob: Data backbone connecting controller, thermostats, zone controllers, and external systems.

vnUnits.name: DHW Storage Cylinder
vnUnits.functionalJob: Insulated vessel (150–300 L residential) heated by internal coil from boiler circuit.

vnUnits.name: Instantaneous DHW Heat Exchanger
vnUnits.functionalJob: Secondary plate heat exchanger in combi boilers heating potable water on demand.

vnUnits.name: Legionella Protection
vnUnits.functionalJob: Periodic thermal disinfection raising cylinder to >60 °C.

vnUnits.name: Installation Tooling
vnUnits.functionalJob: Specialised tools for system installation: pipe preparation, flue fitting, system flushing.

vnUnits.name: Commissioning & Start-Up
vnUnits.functionalJob: Verification, parameterisation, and performance validation before occupant handover.

vnUnits.name: Aftermarket Service & Spare Parts
vnUnits.functionalJob: Ongoing maintenance, warranty, and spare parts.

vnUnits.name: Thermal Energy Meter (Heat Meter)
vnUnits.functionalJob: MID-certified instrument measuring delivered thermal energy: Q = integral(flow x density x cp x delta-T) dt.

vnUnits.name: Efficiency Verification
vnUnits.functionalJob: Monitoring and reporting systems for regulatory compliance.
